channel.title: +IYI on Vishvas's notes
channel.description: Recent content in +IYI on Vishvas's notes

item.title: Examples
item.description: been talking to someone with an IQ clearly above 150 a bit recently. makes it clear that raw intelligence falls short if you don’t know enough basic factual information. ie just reading some history books allows you to stand on shoulders and takedown ppl way faster CPU-wise. i should be clear i think this person’s IQ is 150 as a floor i bet higher for sure. the raw CPU and RAM is colossal.

item.title: Traits
item.description: Smugness and unwarrented arrogance which lead to underestimation of the opponent. [VO16] Counter-traditionism Note that the below is to be contrasted with “reform within tradition” types. Lack of deep intelligence and respect (to the point of deep disaffection) for time-tested classical/ naturally selected thought despite education NNT16. Lack of regard for tranditional community structure Revolution Revolutionary tendencies Inability to deliver promised goods. “In the manifest failure of their abilities, they take credit for their intentions.
